opportunity_to_observe: Direct evening and morning observation; did not identify face.
temporal_proximity: Close to 30 Nov evening and 1 Dec morning events.
internal_consistency: Mixed: belief same person but no facial identification.
external_consistency: Consistent with CHR-0006 and CHR-0009 as observations.
corroboration: Supported by chronology and Moss-related discovery sequence.
potential_bias: Unknown; no bias indicated in index.
ocr_or_record_limitations: Witness name illegible in OCR; visual check required.
evidentiary_value: Useful for sighting and discovery context, not settled identity.
notes: Do not use as facial identification.
